name: Accordion
description: Vertically stacked collapsible sections that expand to reveal content.

api.name: Accordion
api.description: Vertically stacked collapsible sections that expand to reveal content.

records.name: AccordionContext
records.signature: AccordionContext(AccordionType Type, HashSet<string> OpenItems, EventCallback<string> Toggle)

examples.title: Single (Default)
examples.code:
<Accordion Type="Accordion.AccordionType.Single">
    <AccordionItem Value="item-1">
        <AccordionTrigger>Is it accessible?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Yes. It adheres to the WAI-ARIA design pattern.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
    <AccordionItem Value="item-2">
        <AccordionTrigger>Is it styled?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Yes. It comes with default styles that match the other components' aesthetic.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
    <AccordionItem Value="item-3">
        <AccordionTrigger>Is it animated?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Yes. It's animated by default, but you can disable it if you prefer.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>

examples.title: FAQ
examples.code:
<Accordion Type="Accordion.AccordionType.Single">
    <AccordionItem Value="q1">
        <AccordionTrigger>What payment methods do you accept?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
    <AccordionItem Value="q2">
        <AccordionTrigger>Can I cancel my subscription at any time?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Yes, cancel anytime. Access continues until end of billing period.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
    <AccordionItem Value="q3">
        <AccordionTrigger>Do you offer a free trial?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>14-day free trial, no credit card required.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>

examples.title: Multiple
examples.code:
<Accordion Type="Accordion.AccordionType.Multiple">
    <AccordionItem Value="item-1">
        <AccordionTrigger>What is Lumeo?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Lumeo is a Blazor component library inspired by shadcn/ui, built with Tailwind CSS.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
    <AccordionItem Value="item-2">
        <AccordionTrigger>Which .NET version?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Lumeo targets .NET 10 and uses Tailwind CSS v4 for styling.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
    <AccordionItem Value="item-3">
        <AccordionTrigger>Can I customize it?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Absolutely. All components accept a Class parameter for additional CSS classes.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>

examples.title: Type — interactive
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_accordionTypeSel" Options="_accordionTypeOptions" />
<Accordion Type="@_activeAccordionType">
    <AccordionItem Value="a">
        <AccordionTrigger>Is it accessible?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Yes. It adheres to the WAI-ARIA design pattern.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
    <AccordionItem Value="b">
        <AccordionTrigger>Is it styled?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Yes. It comes with default styles.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
    <AccordionItem Value="c">
        <AccordionTrigger>Is it animated?</AccordionTrigger>
        <AccordionContent>Yes. Animated by default.</AccordionContent>
    </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>

@code {
    private string _accordionTypeSel = "Single";
    private Accordion.AccordionType _activeAccordionType => Enum.Parse<Accordion.AccordionType>(_accordionTypeSel);
    private List<Segmented.SegmentedOption> _accordionTypeOptions = new()
    {
        new() { Label = "Single", Value = "Single" },
        new() { Label = "Multiple", Value = "Multiple" },
    };
}

parameters.name: ForceMount
parameters.description: When true, this panel is always rendered into the DOM (with the hidden attribute when closed) instead of being unmounted. Use when child state (form inputs, scroll position, expensive component init) must survive closing the accordion item. Default false preserves the original unmount behaviour.

mdSummary:
# Accordion

Vertically stacked collapsible sections that expand to reveal content.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/accordion

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Accordion | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Accordion | Type | `AccordionType` | `AccordionType.Single` |  |
| Accordion | DefaultValues | `List<string>?` | `` |  |
| Accordion | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Accordion | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AccordionContent | Context | `Accordion.AccordionContext` | `default!` |  |
| AccordionContent | ItemContext | `AccordionItem.AccordionItemContext` | `default!` |  |
| AccordionContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AccordionContent | ForceMount | `bool` | `` | When true, this panel is always rendered into the DOM (with the hidden attribute when closed) instead of being unmounted. Use when child state (form inputs, scroll position, expensive component init) must survive closing the accordion item. Default false preserves the original unmount behaviour. |
| AccordionContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AccordionContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AccordionItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AccordionItem | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| AccordionItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| AccordionItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AccordionItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AccordionTrigger | Context | `Accordion.AccordionContext` | `default!` |  |
| AccordionTrigger | ItemContext | `AccordionItem.AccordionItemContext` | `default!` |  |
| AccordionTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AccordionTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AccordionTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Accordion) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AccordionContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AccordionItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AccordionTrigger) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `AccordionContent`, `AccordionItem`, `AccordionTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Accordion.AccordionContext`)
- `ItemContext` (`AccordionItem.AccordionItemContext`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Accordion />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Accordion/Accordion.razor`
- `UI/Accordion/AccordionContent.razor`
- `UI/Accordion/AccordionItem.razor`
- `UI/Accordion/AccordionTrigger.razor`
